---
name: feature request
about: propose a new capability
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## the problem

what is the user-visible problem this would solve. who feels it.

## proposed solution

how you think it should work. api shape, config keys, output.

## alternatives

other ways you considered solving this and why you did not pick them.

## scope

is this a v0.2, v0.3, or later. small fix or new module. honest estimate.
